items.title: AI日报
items.mainLine: 今日筛出 24 条 AI 技术信号，优先看 「At Cannes Lions, NVIDIA Partners Reshape Advertising and Marketing With AI」、「Coherent Breaks Ground on Expanded Texas Facility, Scaling AI’s Optical Backbone」。脉络集中在大模型训练/推理、Agent Skill、Auto-Research/Harness 与可复制工程实践。

items.title: OpenRouter vs Portkey: Which LLM Gateway for Your Team?OpenRouter routes across providers on credits you buy; Portkey governs the provider keys you already have. Here's how they compare on models, observability, compliance, and price.June 19, 2026
items.summary: 来自OpenRouter的这条内容命中大模型训练、推理或评测方向，可作为持续提升推理上限的技术雷达信号。
items.insightText: 关注数据、训练、推理、RAG 或评测设计，评估是否能沉淀到轨迹/地址大模型架构。

items.title: OpenRouter vs LiteLLM: Which LLM Gateway Fits Your Stack?OpenRouter is a managed gateway; LiteLLM is a self-hosted proxy. Here's how they compare on cost, data residency, routing, and latency.June 19, 2026
